Conferences - Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy

Conferences

Leadership & Global Engagement in Oncology Education

Dr.Reddy is renowned for holistic leadership, management skills, and a distinct ability to advance cancer medicine by organizing and participating in major national and international conferences.

Conferences Organized

Holistic, eclectic, and widely recognized, Dr. Reddy has organized and led key events that have shaped Indian and global oncology education.

  • 10th AROI-ESTRO Teaching Course on “Advanced Technologies in Radiation Oncology” (Nov 30–Dec 3, 2023, Apollo Hyderabad)
  • CME on Debates in Uro Oncology Workshop (Nov 25–26, 2023, Apollo Hyderabad)
  • CME on Breast Neoplasms (Aug 27, 2023, Apollo Hyderabad)
  • Workshop on Ocular Oncology (July 1–2, 2023, Apollo Hyderabad)
  • 5th Biennial APOLLO CANCER CONCLAVE & 8th Biennial CANCER CI – 2020 (Feb 13–16, 2020, HICC Hyderabad)
  • APOLLO MASTER CLASS “Basic Biostatistics & Medical Evidence” (Sep 16, 2018, Apollo Cancer Institute Hyderabad)
  • PRODVANCE – June 2018 ICRO–AROI Initiative (June 23–24, 2018, Apollo Cancer Institute Hyderabad)
  • 3rd Biennial APOLLO CANCER CONCLAVE & 7th Biennial CANCER CI – 2017 (Feb 2–5, 2017, HICC Hyderabad)
  • 20th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Paediatric Cancers” (July 18–19, 2015, Apollo Cancer Hospital Hyderabad)
  • 2nd Biennial APOLLO CANCER CONCLAVE & 6th Biennial CANCER CI – 2015 (Feb 4–8, 2015, HICC Hyderabad)
  • 18th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Cancer of Esophagus, Ca. Stomach & Ca. Rectum” (Sep 27–28, 2014, RCC Trivandrum)
  • 17th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Treatment of Lung Cancer” (July 12–13, 2014, Tata Medical Centre Kolkata)
  • 16th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Radiotherapy Planning from 2D to 3D” (Apr 26–27, 2014, IGMC Shimla)
  • 15th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Clinical Trials, Statistics & Thesis Writing” (Sep 7–8, 2013, Mahavir Cancer Sansthan Patna)
  • 14th ICRO PG Teaching Program “Concurrent Chemoradiotherapy – Guidelines and Evidence” (Apr 27–28, 2013, Maulana Azad Medical College New Delhi)
  • 5th Biennial International Conference “CANCER CI – 2013” (Feb 8–10, 2013, Taj Krishna Hyderabad)
  • 4th Biennial International Conference “CANCER CI – 2011” (Feb 25–27, 2011, Taj Krishna Hyderabad)
  • 31st National Annual Conference of Association of Radiation Oncologists of India “AROICON – 2009” (Nov 26–29, 2009, Taj Krishna Hyderabad)
  • 3rd Biennial International Conference “CANCER CI – 2008” (Feb 9–10, 2008, Taj Krishna Hyderabad)
  • 2nd Biennial International Conference “CANCER CI – 2006” (Feb 11–12, 2006, Taj Krishna Hyderabad)
  • 1st International Translational Research Conference “B2B2K5” (Mar 19–20, 2005, CCMB Hyderabad)
  • XI International Congress of Ocular Oncology – 2004 (Jan 23–27, 2004, Shilpakala Vedika Hyderabad)
  • 1st International Conference “CANCER CI – 2003” (Aug 23–24, 2003, Taj Residency Hyderabad)
  • 2nd National Conference on Vascular Restenosis – 2001
  • National Conference of Indian Society of Oncology (ISO) – 2000
  • Intracoronary Brachytherapy Conference – 1998
  • Indo–US Cancer Update ’94 (Sep 1994, Hyderabad)
  • XIV National Conference of Association of Radiation Oncologists of India (AROI) (Jan 1993, Hyderabad)

Conferences Participated

Regularly invited worldwide, Dr. Reddy contributes to the latest advancements through interactive summits and expert panels.

  • 1. PRODVANCE 2022 West Zone Course, Mumbai (Nov 5–6, 2022)
  • 2. Moderator, 'Decision Making for Adjuvant Radiation', 12th ACOS, New Delhi (Apr 8–10, 2016)
  • 3. Chairperson, 'Direction of Current Neuro-oncology Research', ISNOCON, Hyderabad (Apr 1–3, 2016)
  • 4. Panelist, 'Challenges in delivery of chemoradiation in Lung Cancer', ICON Hyderabad (Mar 11–13, 2016)
  • 5. Guest Faculty, AROI – West Bengal Annual State Conference, Kolkata (Feb 20–21, 2016)
  • 6. Guest Faculty, ESTRO–AROI Teaching Course, Max Hospital, New Delhi (Dec 6–9, 2015)
  • 7. Guest Faculty, AROICON 2015, Lucknow (Nov 26–29, 2015)
  • 8. Panelist, ‘Advanced / Metastatic Head & Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma’, ISMPO ISO Conference, Mumbai (Nov 6–7, 2015)
  • 9. Guest Faculty, IBSCON – 2015, Kolkata (Aug 28–30, 2015)
  • 10. Chairperson & Panelist, 'Lung Cancer' & 'Breast Molecular Oncology', Best of ASCO – 2015, Hyderabad (Jun 26–28, 2015)
  • 11. Guest Faculty, Best of ASTRO, Mumbai (May 2–3, 2015)
  • 12. Guest Faculty, 1st Telangana State Dental Conference, Warangal (Dec 12–14, 2014)
  • 13. Guest Faculty, 9th SFO – 2014, Gurgaon (Nov 28–30, 2014)
  • 14. Chairperson, Rangi Prasad Oration, AROICON – 2014, Imphal (Nov 6–9, 2014)
  • 15. Chairperson, AROI–ESTRO Teaching Course, Chennai (Oct 19–22, 2014)
  • 16. Chairperson & Panelist, Advances in Breast Cancer – 2014, Goa (Oct 10–12, 2014)
  • 17. Panelist, NATCON IASO 2014, Chennai (Sep 18–21, 2014)
  • 18. Guest Faculty, 2nd Fortis Radiation Oncology Annual Conference, Gurgaon (Aug 30–31, 2014)
  • 19. Panelist, Best of ASCO – 2014, Hyderabad (Jun 27–29, 2014)
  • 20. Guest Faculty, Indo-Global Healthcare Summit & Expo – 2014, Hyderabad (Jun 20–22, 2014)
  • 21. Guest Faculty, 30th ICON, Ahmedabad (Apr 4–6, 2014)
  • 22. Attended, 2nd European Conference on Innovative Radiation, Berlin (Mar 7–8, 2014)
  • 23. Panelist, Apollo Cancer Conclave – 2014, Chennai (Feb 7–9, 2014)
  • 24. Advisor, APAC Advisory Board, Beijing, China (Dec 21, 2013)
  • 25. Guest Faculty, 1st Indian Cancer Congress, New Delhi (Nov 21–24, 2013)
  • 26. Attended, FARO, Bangkok, Thailand (Nov 5–6, 2013)
  • 27. Attended, AROI–ESTRO Teaching Course, Indore (Oct 27–30, 2013)
  • 28. Presented Paper, ASTRO – 2013, Atlanta, USA (Sep 22–25, 2013)
  • 29. Guest Faculty, Masters Course in Head & Neck Oncology, Bangalore (Aug 9–10, 2013)
  • 30. Guest Faculty, III Eurasian Head & Neck Cancer Forum, Russia (Jul 25–28, 2013)
  • 31. Panelist, Best of ASCO – 2013, Mumbai (Jun 28–30, 2013)
  • 32. Panelist, 13th St. Gallens Update, Mumbai (May 18, 2013)
  • 33. Panelist, Global Oncology Summit – 2013, Hyderabad (Mar 28–31, 2013)
  • 34. Guest Faculty, Confluence – 2013, New Delhi (Mar 23–24, 2013)
  • 35. Guest Faculty, ASNO – 2013, Mumbai (Mar 21–24, 2013)
  • 36. Guest Faculty, Apollo Medical Centre, Muscat (Jan 26, 2013)
  • 37. Moderator, AROICON – 2012, Kolkata (Nov 29 – Dec 2, 2012)
  • 38. Guest Faculty, UICC – 2012, Montreal, Canada (Aug 27–30, 2012)
  • 39. Guest Faculty, Apollo National CME Oncology, Kolkata (Aug 17–19, 2012)
  • 40. Moderator, Panel Discussion, National Seminar on Breast Cancer Foundation, Patna (Aug 4–5, 2012)
  • 41. Guest Faculty, Best of ASCO – 2012, Jaipur (Jun 23–24, 2012)
  • 42. Attended and Presented, ASCO – 2012, Chicago, USA (Jun 1–6, 2012)
  • 43. Guest Faculty, International Conference on Multidisciplinary Management of Common Cancers – 2012, Kovalam, Trivandrum (May 4–6, 2012)
  • 44. Guest Faculty, SPG Conference, Hyderabad (Feb 16–18, 2012)
  • 45. Guest Faculty, International Conference on Ocular Oncology, FUSION – 2012, Hyderabad (Feb 12–14, 2012)
  • 46. Guest Faculty, 26th AMOGS Conference – 2012, Nanded (Jan 6–8, 2012)
  • 47. Guest Faculty, 33rd National Conference of AROICON – 2011, Jaipur (Nov 24–27, 2011)
  • 48. Guest Faculty, 11th FHNO & 2nd Asian Society of Head & Neck Oncology Meeting, Goa (Oct 5–9, 2011)
  • 49. Attended, ASTRO – 2011, 53rd Annual Meeting, Miami Beach, Florida, USA (Oct 2–6, 2011)
  • 50. Attended, ASCO Annual Meeting, Chicago, Illinois, USA (Jun 3–7, 2011)
  • 51. Guest Faculty, 3rd Asia Pacific RT User Meeting, Hong Kong (Mar 11–13, 2011)
  • 52. Guest Faculty, IBt-BEBIG International Brachytherapy HDR User Group Meeting, Pattaya, Thailand (Feb 18–20, 2011)
  • 53. Guest Faculty, All India Congress of Obstetrics & Gynaecology, HICC, Hyderabad (Jan 5–9, 2011)
  • 54. Attended, San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium – 2010, Texas, USA (Dec 8–12, 2010)
  • 55. Guest Faculty, 32nd National Conference of AROICON – 2010, Patna (Nov 25–28, 2010)
  • 56. Panelist, Head & Neck Expert Forum, 2nd ENCEF Live Webcast Program, Mumbai (Nov 4, 2010)

  • 66. Guest Faculty, ONCOLOGY – 2009, Kottayam, Kerala (Apr 23–26, 2009)
  • 67. Guest Faculty, XIII Annual National Conference of BRECON – 2009, Madurai (Mar 7–8, 2009)
  • 68. Moderator, ONCOCON – 2009, ISO/ISMPO Biennial Conference, Chennai (Feb 13–15, 2009)
  • 69. Guest Faculty, Recent Advances in Molecular Imaging and Radiation Oncology (RAMIRO) – 2009, Bangalore (Jan 18–19, 2009)
  • 70. Guest Faculty, APLCC – 2008, Hyderabad (Dec 5–7, 2008)

Swipe or Click

Leading cancer care with over 34 years of experience in radiation oncology. Providing compassionate, evidence-based treatment and hope to thousands of patients through advanced technologies like Proton Therapy and Brachytherapy.
